The '''''Kimik''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] used by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s forces to assault [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[C-3 passenger liner|C-3 Passenger Liner]] ''[[Excalibur]]''. With the aid of [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] and his [[Missile Boat]], the ''Excalibur'' escaped into hyperspace, thwarting Zaarin's plans yet again.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
